name: epiandrosterone to NAD
summary: A 13-step route from epiandrosterone to NAD(+), ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: 3-ketosteroid 9alpha-monooxygenase
reactions.equation: androsta-1,4-diene-3,17-dione + 2 reduced [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + O2 + 2 H(+) = 9alpha-hydroxyandrosta-1,4-diene-3,17-dione + 2 oxidized [2Fe-2S]-[ferredoxin] + H2O
